LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT/CROSS - COMPLAINANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS RELATED RELIEF IS DENIED. COURT LACKS STATUTORY AUTHORITY TO IMPOSE THE REQUESTED SANCTIONS. C C P 128.6 IS NOT OPERATIVE, ONLY 128.7 IS AND ITS REQUIREMENTS HAVE NOT BEEN MET. IN ANY EVENT SANCTIONS FOR EMOTIONAL DISTRESS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES TO A PROPER PARTY WOULD NOT BE ALLOWED. ALL PARTIES ARE EXPECTED TO ACT COURTEOUSLY AND WITHIN THE LAW IN THEIR DEALINGS WITH ADVERSE PARTIES AND COUNSEL. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 (301/PJB)

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-07-2008 IN 206, PLAINTIFF ROBERT HANSEN'S MOTION FOR SINGLE ASSIGNMENT GRANTED. ON IT'S OWN MOTION, THE COURT SINGLY ASSIGNS CASE NUMBER 464387, GRAYSON VS. HANSEN, TO THE SAME JUDGE FOR ALL PURPOSES. DEFENDANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S 170.6 PEREMPTORY CHALLENGE AS TO JUDGE MELLON SUSTAINED. CASE NUMBER 464387 AND 473509 ARE SINGLY ASSIGNED TO THE HON. JULIE TANG FOR ALL PURPOSES. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE AN ORDER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

DEFENDANT/CROSS - COMPLAINANT VIOLET GRAYSON'S Motion For Sanctions Related Relief IS DENIED. COURT LACKS STATUTORY AUTHORITY TO IMPOSE THE REQUESTED SANCTIONS.
